page_metadata.biotools__summary: A versatile MATLAB toolbox for High Content Analysis (HCA) of microscopy data. TATICS has been developed for image cytometry of non-adherent cells such as hematopoietic cells.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A versatile MATLAB toolbox for High Content Analysis (HCA) of microscopy data. TATICS has been developed for image cytometry of non-adherent cells such as hematopoietic cells.
